versions.author: fable
changes: Kimi code prompt: edit a mechanically hipified draft instead of re-porting from scratch
Kimi code prompt: checklist narrowed from 9 items to the 4 wavefront64 semantics a regex cannot do
Kimi refine prompt: state that the mechanical pass is applied; name cuda* symbols that crept back
Output-token budget sized to the kernel via _compute_adaptive_max_tokens instead of a flat 16384

versions.author: fable
changes: Initial versioned system prompts for DeepSeek (planner), Kimi (coder), GLM (evaluator)
Moved the GLM error-analyst role from an inline call-site string into SYSTEM_PROMPTS
Added the two-layer SIGSEGV constraint to the Kimi refine prompt (frozen Layer 1 base)
Refine prompt now reports the real stagnation threshold instead of a hardcoded 3
